content.en:
"The space-time oscillation technique has been cultivated to the extreme level!"

Ye Tian has rarely cultivated the space-time oscillation technique in these tens of millions of years, but he has also cultivated it to the extreme level, and the power of the space-time oscillation technique at the extreme level is indeed very powerful, which has made Ye Tian's strength increase a lot.

But in these tens of millions of miles, Ye Tian's greatest progress was still cultivation.

At this moment, he had already fused his physical body with the True Spirit by seventy percent, and his strength was more than three times stronger than when he had just stepped into the half-step True Spirit.

Other than that.

Ye Tian also cultivated his Blood River True Body, God Destroying and Divine Power three Origin Divine Powers to the consummation realm, but it was a pity that these three Origin Divine Powers were not very strong, and they were only a little stronger than the Time and Space Shock Technique.

In addition, Ye Tian's Dao prototype has also become more powerful.

The prototype of his avenue is 70,000 meters long and nearly 30,000 meters wide, and this kind of prototype is definitely more terrifying than an ordinary avenue.

However, after the rudimentary form of the Great Dao was cultivated to a length of 70,000 meters, it would be more difficult to make progress, no matter how high Ye Tian's comprehension was, no matter how many resources he had, he would not be able to grow rapidly.

After all, many True Monarchs have been trapped in the True Spirit Realm for a lifetime, and it is difficult for them to cultivate a Great Dao Prototype to the 100,000-meter perfection level.

There are even some true monarchs who have cultivated the prototype of a great avenue to 9,999 meters, and it is always difficult to break the shackles of the last meter.

"Don't be in a hurry, the Origin Divine Power can be slowly created and improved, there is no need to rush to create a powerful Origin Divine Power. At present, the most important thing is to complete the fusion of the true spirit and the physical body, and enter the true spirit realm as soon as possible, so that you can continue to improve your cultivation and strengthen your spirit and spirit!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

He's not like anyone else.

The spirit of others is three aspects, and if you want to make progress in three aspects, you must improve them one by one.

And he has completed the unity of essence and spirit, even if he arbitrarily improves one aspect, the other two aspects will make rapid progress, which is one of the benefits of the unity of essence and spirit.

this day.

Countless beings in the Great Universe discovered that the chaotic vitality in the universe began to rise rapidly, and many ordinary places had turned into cultivation treasures.

Countless top-notch cultivation treasures were born one by one, countless treasures were quickly bred, and even rare realm treasures were born one after another.

This phenomenon has attracted the attention of many major forces.

Ye Tian also received the first telegram from the three aspects of the Human Race, the Void Heaven Palace, and the Yang Dragon True Monarch.

So, Ye Tian went out.

The conference hall of the Void Heaven Temple.

Ye Tian, Swallowing Moon True Monarch, Peng Yu True Monarch, Dark Light True Monarch and other true monarchs all gathered here.

Among the people present, Ye Tian's status is undoubtedly the highest, and his strength is also the strongest, but the person in charge is the True Monarch of the Swallowing Moon, because Ye Tian is in retreat all the year round, and he rarely manages the affairs of the Void Heaven Palace, and it is not easy to interfere.

Seeing that the personnel were almost there, the Moon Swallowing True Monarch spoke: "Everyone, you should have received the news, the Great Universe is now evolving very fast, hundreds of times faster than before. Originally, according to our expectations, it would take at least 10 billion years for the Great Universe to advance to the Quasi-Dao Realm level. The Quasi-Dao Realm is second only to the Dao Realm, and although it still can't accommodate the True Ancestor, it can accommodate a half-step True Ancestor powerhouse. At the current level of evolution, perhaps in another 100,000 years, the Quasi-Dao Realm will be formed. When the time comes, the third group of personnel is estimated to arrive!"

"The third batch, so fast!"

The True Monarchs were shocked.

Many of them have entered the Great Universe, and they thought that they could still fish for many treasures, but once the third batch of personnel arrived, the pressure of competition would be too great.

It is conceivable that the third group of personnel must be true monarchs, and there are even invincible true monarchs who can fight with true ancestors, and even kill true ancestors.

In front of those true monarchs, they were just ants.

Isn't it ridiculous to compete for the opportunity with such a true monarch?

Originally, according to their plan, if they cultivated with peace of mind for another 10 billion years, they would definitely be able to become True Monarchs at the peak of the True Spirit Realm, and even have a glimmer of hope of stepping into a half-step True Ancestor.

In case you get some big opportunities in the big universe, you won't be afraid of the third batch of people at all, and you will even be able to compete for the Dao Ancestor quota in the future!

But now the Great Universe is evolving too fast, and it is too unfavorable for them.

"How could this happen, it's so abnormal!I've read ancient records, the birth of the Dao Realm is a very normal evolutionary process, and it won't be like this!" Peng Yu Zhenjun wondered.

"I don't know!"

Swallowing Moon True Monarch shook his head, and then said, "Maybe the Dao Ancestors know the reason, but the Dao Ancestors won't easily inform us of the situation, unless we go to the Dao Ancestors!"

Ask the ancestor?

Who dares to ask, if there is no amazing big thing, they don't dare to disturb the Dao Ancestor at all, usually they just contact the True Ancestor of the Void Heaven Lineage, and then the True Ancestor will contact the Dao Ancestor.

The only person who is really qualified to contact Dao Ancestor is Ye Tian.

However, they didn't rush Ye Tian either, anyway, in the near future, the specific secrets would definitely come out, and they were not in a hurry.

"Ladies and gentlemen, as soon as the Quasi-Dao Realm is established, the major forces will take action to completely stabilize their territory, and they can even prepare to build their territory into a real country. Once the true kingdom is completed, it will be more difficult for other forces to invade us, and the true kingdom can continue to condense qi luck and form a qi luck chaos true dragon. "

Swallowing the Moon True Monarch said.

"But the core of the real country has not yet arrived!"

A true monarch.

"As soon as the third group of personnel arrives, the core of the true kingdom will naturally arrive, we will prepare first, and in addition, we can annex some weak forces and expand the sphere of influence as much as possible. The bigger the true kingdom, the greater the benefit to us!"

Swallowing Moon True Monarch said.

Everyone nodded, and even Ye Tian agreed.

If he hadn't joined the Void Heaven Temple, he might not have understood the meaning of the representative of the True Kingdom, and if he wanted to obtain the Dao Ancestor quota, he would have to build the True Kingdom.

And to build a true country, you need a true country core, but the true country core is too precious, equivalent to the value of a Taoist weapon, and the major forces don't dare to carry the true country core in the early stage, otherwise once it is snatched away, the loss will be too great.

The core of the true kingdom can condense luck, and the high-level of the core of the true kingdom are shrouded in luck, which is equivalent to the son of destiny of the Dao realm, and there is an increase in the chance of obtaining the number of ancestral monuments.

Because of this, it is difficult for non-big force true ancestors to obtain the Dao Ancestor quota.

And there are several Dao Ancestors of some top powers, but it is difficult for them to become Dao Ancestors when they are scattered, and they don't even understand the secrets.

Of course, it's not that casual cultivation can't become a Dao Ancestor, as long as the strength is enough, one person can defeat a big force, snatch the core of the true country, and build a true country by one person, so as to obtain the Dao Ancestor quota in the subsequent competition and become a Dao Ancestor.

But the probability of this is too low, and most of the geniuses who dare to do this are dead.

In the following days, the top major forces were all purging the surrounding small forces, and all the forces that did not have Dao Ancestor in charge were invaded one after another, and I don't know how many True Monarchs fell.

And the sphere of influence of the Void Heaven Temple has also grown rapidly, and in just a few thousand years, it has grown to several times the area of the past.

And the Dark God Society, which has always been in the shadows, has also come to the surface, and has broken through many forces in one fell swoop, and also occupies a large territory.
